entry.title: Refactor ORM 2: The Query Object and Dynamic Query Language
entry.summary: This article explores how to use query object instances to automatically generate dynamic query conditions. By abstracting query conditions into four types of fields—predicate suffix fields, logical suffix fields, subquery fields, and entity relationship fields—it achieves automatic construction of different kind of query conditions.
entry.content: This article explores how to use query object instances to automatically generate dynamic query conditions. By abstracting query conditions into four types of fields—predicate suffix fields, logical suffix fields, subquery fields, and entity relationship fields—it achieves automatic construction of different kind of query conditions.

entry.title: 从ORM到OQM之3：查询对象和动态查询语言
entry.summary: 本文探讨了如何利用查询对象实例自动生成动态查询条件，通过将查询条件抽象为四种字段类型（谓词后缀字段、逻辑后缀字段、子查询字段和实体关系字段）以实现查询条件的自动构造。
entry.content: 本文探讨了如何利用查询对象实例自动生成动态查询条件，通过将查询条件抽象为四种字段类型（谓词后缀字段、逻辑后缀字段、子查询字段和实体关系字段）以实现查询条件的自动构造。

entry.title: Refactor ORM: Property-Related Duplication in Dynamic Queries and its Refactor Approach
entry.summary:
Introduction

The dynamic queries is a long-standing pain point in ORM frameworks.
Solving this problem will have a profound impact on simplifying the interaction logic of the database and improving the maintainability of the code.
This article locates a structural duplication in dynamic queries and proposes a general reconstruction method to optimize the code related to dynamic queries.
entry.content:
Introduction

The dynamic queries is a long-standing pain point in ORM frameworks.
Solving this problem will have a profound impact on simplifying the interaction logic of the database and improving the maintainability of the code.
This article locates a structural duplication in dynamic queries and proposes a general reconstruction method to optimize the code related to dynamic queries.

entry.title: 从ORM到OQM之2：动态查询中的属性相关型重复及其重构方法
entry.summary:
介绍

动态查询问题是ORM框架中一个长期存在的痛点。
解决这个问题将对简化数据库的交互逻辑和提高代码的可维护性产生深远影响。
本文定位了动态查询中的一种结构型重复，并提出了一种通用的重构方法，以优化动态查询相关的代码。
entry.content:
介绍

动态查询问题是ORM框架中一个长期存在的痛点。
解决这个问题将对简化数据库的交互逻辑和提高代码的可维护性产生深远影响。
本文定位了动态查询中的一种结构型重复，并提出了一种通用的重构方法，以优化动态查询相关的代码。

entry.title: How to express `select * from user where id = ? or name = ? and age = ?` in GoooQo
在GoooQo中怎么表达select * from user where id = ? or (name = ? and age = ?)
What?! Go Implementation of OQM Can Build CRUD in Just Two Lines?
entry.summary: This is all thanks to the support of OQM (Object Query-Language Mapping) technology, we developed a Go version called GoooQo.
entry.content: This is all thanks to the support of OQM (Object Query-Language Mapping) technology, we developed a Go version called GoooQo.

entry.title: 什么?！Golang里两行代码就能搞定增删查改接口了？
entry.summary: 这都得益于OQM（Object Query-Language Mapping）技术的加持，我们开发了一个Go版本的实现，GoooQo 。
entry.content: 这都得益于OQM（Object Query-Language Mapping）技术的加持，我们开发了一个Go版本的实现，GoooQo 。
